item.title: State-owned operator reveals new oil and gas finds in flagship offshore basin
item.description: ONGC pushing ahead with exploration plans in drive to boost domestic oil production

item.title: Front runner emerges for Chevron floating production unit
item.description: The floater will deployed at the Aphrodite field offshore Cyprus

item.title: Oil falls below $90 on hopes for Hormuz
item.description: Hints at a forthcoming deal to end the war from both the US and Iran sent crude prices tumbling

item.title: Industry shifting away from US shale to offshore, says TechnipFMC chief
item.description: Doug Pferdehirt said the weight of oil and gas investment is moving decidedly toward offshore plays

item.title: Chinese wind specialist breaks into FPSO sector
item.description: Titan Wind Energy to build hull for floater ordered by OceanStar Elite Group

item.title: Harbour completes sale of Indonesia assets
item.description: Natuna Sea Block A and Tuna production sharing contacts sold to Prime Group

item.title: Drilling contractor restarting PNG activities
item.description: High Arctic Overseas prepares to drill up to four wells in PNG after lengthy hiatus

item.title: French vessel owner lands Malampaya prize
item.description: Bourbon makes Philippines' debut with multi-year contract with Prime Energy

item.title: ABL prepares for Australia’s largest offshore decommissioning campaign
item.description: Esso Australia plans to remove up to 13 platforms

item.title: BP success spurs widened role in Asian operator's production drive
item.description: ONGC last year brought on board BP to help revive oil and gas output at ageing Mumbai High field

item.title: ExxonMobil shareholders approve Texas move
item.description: US supermajor to officially re-incorporate in Lone Star State after 144 years in New Jersey

item.title: Chevron shareholders reject bid for independent chairperson
item.description: Chief executive Mike Wirth will stay on in his dual role as chairman of the board

item.title: Petrobras targets $500 million gas production boost for Brazil’s Amazon
item.description: Brazilian company almost divested the Urucu hub after the Covid pandemic

item.title: Ukraine resumes assault on Russia's oil exports with new Black Sea attacks
item.description: Ukraine targets oil export facilities in Novorossiysk and Tuapse that were the subject of previous strikes

item.title: Jumbo orders high-spec heavy lift vessels
item.description: New L-Class design features increased lifting and cargo carrying capacities

item.title: SLB well chief drills down on industry's future gamechangers
item.description: Automation, digital monitoring and hardware key for industry’s ongoing transformation, SLB president of well construction tells Upstream

item.title: Vallourec wins Guyana subsea gig for ExxonMobil
item.description: French contractor to supply more line pipe for operations on prolific Stabroek block

item.title: Explosion on oil tanker as Iran vows revenge for latest US air strikes
item.description: Master of Greek-controlled VLCC reports no injuries but some bunker fuel discharging into the sea

item.title: Bouri beefed up: Saipem installs hefty module offshore Libya
item.description: Critical 5200-tonne topsides built by Rosetti Marino

item.title: UK player boosts Angola portfolio with latest asset
item.description: Afentra is progressing an early-phase work programme for newly-awarded onshore Block KON 4

item.title: Subsea deal could signal start of Norway tie-back trend, says contractor
item.description: Worley Rosenberg says subsea tie-backs are a long-term opportunity for local suppliers

item.title: Chevron spuds exploration well near big Egypt discovery
item.description: Nargis-2 well drilling ahead in Mediterranean Sea

item.title: Petrobras issues first-of-its-kind tender for specialised vessel to install rigid risers
item.description: New strategy could shift how the Brazilian player contracts subsea solutions for pre-salt projects

item.title: Malaysian yard scoops largest platform to date
item.description: Brooke Holding wins engineering, procurement and construction prize for PTTEP's Sirung-Chenda project

item.title: Australian operator acquires offshore field to boost flagship gas project
item.description: Amplitude Energy eyes tie-in of Artisan gas discovery to East Coast Supply Project

item.title: Asian operator starts race for flagship offshore deal
item.description: ONGC’s west coast offshore fields are maturing and require several phases of redevelopment to maintain their production profiles, including the replacement of several segments of subsea pipelines

item.title: Eleventh-hour talks avert strike action at flagship Australia LNG project
item.description: Unionised workers at Inpex’s Ichthys assets agree to continue talks on wages and conditions

item.title: Vietnam launches bidding round for offshore exploration acreage
item.description: Vietnam invites interested companies to bid for acreage in Cuu Long basin

item.title: Bangladesh tries again with new offshore licensing round
item.description: After 2024's failure to secure any production sharing contracts, country opens bidding for 26 offshore blocks under revised framework in drive to ease supply insecurity

item.title: Abrupt BP chair exit leaves investors seeking answers... again
item.description: As another top executive abruptly leaves BP, fresh uncertainty engulfs supermajor's new phase
